description: Static tiers pass (Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 GREEN) and the behavioral tier ran but surfaced a blocking failure (Tier 3 RED). A behavioral failure blocks promotion: final FAIL. Which behavioral-eval layer / which model failed is in the evidence, not in this aggregate.
why: § 6 R7 (t3=RED disjunct) on a run where Tier 3 actually executed. Row (PASS, GREEN|YELLOW, RED) -> FAIL.
